description.default: HR moderation workspace for HB Kudos. Requires kudosAdminsGroup and/or kudosReviewersGroup to be configured in the property pane — the webpart shows a configuration-required state until at least one group is set. Includes governance actions, scheduling, prominence, claim/reassign, role-aware detail panel with audit timeline, bulk approve, and configurable overdue thresholds (pendingOverdueDays, adminReviewOverdueDays). Notification intents are session-queued; delivery channels (email/Teams) are not yet integrated. simulatedRole is dev-only and ignored in live SharePoint.
